creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199428
libhtp update to 0.5.8

- Updates to 0.5.28.
  Changelog ( https://github.com/OISF/libhtp/releases ):
  * Fix potential memory leaks
  * Fix string truncation compile warning

- Reorders some variables consistently with the order described in the porter's handbook.

Tested successfully with portlint and poudriere (11.2-RELEASE i386/amd64).
